description: CHG Trigger Rules — Yoda monitors these and raises CHG+Telegram alert when triggered.
changeNote: TRIGGER-04 fired: v2026.6.6 detected. Ken decided DEFER + SANDBOX (CHG-0521). TKT-0501/0502 created.

TRIGGER-01.name: OC2 Arrival — Master Gate
TRIGGER-01.description: OC2 arrival is now the master gate. All OC2-era actions are sequenced as sub-actions under TRIGGER-01, executed in priority order after hardware is online.

subActions.name: Hardware Setup
subActions.action: Unbox OC2-A + OC2-B. Connect power, network, Tailscale. Verify both nodes reachable on tailnet.

subActions.name: OpenClaw Install on OC2-A/B
subActions.action: Install OpenClaw v2026.5.27+ on OC2-A (primary) and OC2-B (standby). Configure HIVE HA pair. Deploy tech agent fleet (~10 agents: Yoda, Atlas, Thrawn, Forge, Lando, Mon Mothma, Warden, Ahsoka, Luthen; Shield/Lex/Sage stay here). Krennic parked.

subActions.name: CLAUDE RESTORE — Anthropic API Key Re-provisioning
subActions.action: Ken provides new Anthropic API key. Execute SOP: (1) Store in Keychain as 'ainchors-anthropic-api-key', (2) Add auth.profiles.anthropic:default to openclaw.json, (3) Add anthropic model aliases, (4) Update model-policy.json whitelist, (5) Run validate-fallback-chain.sh, (6) Restore agent primary models from claude-restore-config.json.
subActions.note: Folded from standalone TRIGGER-14 per Ken directive 2026-05-29. Claude Restore now gates on OC2 arrival — no point restoring on OC1 when platform is about to migrate.

subActions.name: Platform Separation — OC1 Business Standalone
subActions.action: Execute Platform Separation per approved option paper. Phase 1: Wipe OC1, fresh OpenClaw install, deploy 6 business agents (Aria lead + Shield/Lex/Sage duplicated + Spark + Forge-ops). Phase 2: OC2 tech platform validated ≥1 week before OC1 wipe. Phase 3: Cutover Angie/KL team to OC1 business node. Phase 4: Stabilisation.
kenDecisions: C3: New Google Workspace for tech ✅
subActions.note: Platform Separation approved 2026-05-29. Phase 0 prep can start now. Full migration gated on OC2 arrival + validation.

subActions.name: PostgreSQL Migration OC1 → OC2
subActions.action: Restore PG from OC1 backup to OC2-A. Configure HA replication to OC2-B. Validate all 32 tables, ticket state, cost history. Slim PG on OC1 (business-only tables or PG-free).

subActions.name: qwen3.5:cloud Reassessment
subActions.action: Re-benchmark qwen3.5:cloud on OC2. Re-test with think:false on all 5 benchmark tasks. If avg latency ≤20s → approve for async/batch Tier 2. If still fails → close out permanently.

subActions.name: Orchestrator MD Version Bump
subActions.action: Version bump SOUL.md + YODA_RULES.md + ORCHESTRATOR.md to reflect OC2 architecture, HA state, Gemma4:26b local inference, Platform Separation.

subActions.name: SecretRefs Keychain Integration
subActions.action: Implement SecretRefs with macOS Keychain integration (TKT-0228). Migrate all API keys from hardcoded config to structured SecretRefs.

subActions.name: Tech Stream Google Workspace
subActions.action: Create new Google Workspace for tech stream (C3). Migrate Yoda/tech agent auth from kenmun@ainchors.com to new account. Aria keeps kenmun@ on OC1 business node.

TRIGGER-02.name: OC2 HA Live
TRIGGER-02.condition: OC2-A and OC2-B both online, validated, HA failover tested
TRIGGER-02.detection: manual — validated after TRIGGER-01 sub-actions complete
TRIGGER-02.action: Activate HA architecture. Configure NAS shared state. Run full failover drill.

TRIGGER-03.name: Gemma4 Validated on OC2
TRIGGER-03.condition: Gemma4:26b confirmed running on OC2 at acceptable performance
TRIGGER-03.action: Benchmark gemma4:26b + gemma4:31b-coding-mtp-bf16 on OC2. If pass rate ≥75%, swap governance agents (Shield/Lex/Sage/Warden) from gemma4:31b-cloud to local gemma4:26b (Tier 1). Update model-policy.json.
TRIGGER-03.note: Gemma4 cloud model assignments frozen until OC2. No changes to gemma4:31b-cloud cron assignments now. Full gemma4 model strategy review (local + cloud) at OC2 gate. Ken decision: 2026-06-02.
TRIGGER-03.kenDecision: Reviewed all cron model assignments 2026-06-02. No changes. Gemma4 cloud models (gemma4:31b-cloud) remain as-is. 429 quota exhaustion is a billing issue, not an architecture issue. Full review deferred to OC2 when local gemma4:26b becomes viable.

TRIGGER-04.name: OpenClaw Security Patch
TRIGGER-04.condition: New OpenClaw version released with security fix
TRIGGER-04.action: Critical CVE: update within 48h. High: within 7 days.

lastDecision.reason: v2026.6.6 heavy on security boundary tightening (transcripts, sandbox binds, MCP stdio, Telegram DM cache fix, fail-closed exec approvals). Closer to High than feature-only. Defer production (OC1 weeks from decommission per Platform Separation), sandbox validation on port 28789 in parallel — bake validated build into OC2 fresh install (TRIGGER-01).

TRIGGER-05.name: Ollama Cloud PoC PASS
TRIGGER-05.condition: PoC Phase 5 returns PASS or PARTIAL PASS
TRIGGER-05.action: Implement 4-tier model strategy. Ken decision gate required before Phase 6.
TRIGGER-05.note: Full PoC PASS. kimi: Q=4.6/5, L=6.8s avg. glm-5.1: FAIL (221s+). qwen3.5: FAIL (42.3s). Phase 6 implemented.

TRIGGER-06.name: OpenClaw v4.0 Ships
TRIGGER-06.action: P3 gate assessment. Present Ken with native multi-agent vs CrewAI evaluation within 24h.

TRIGGER-07.name: First P2 Client
TRIGGER-07.condition: First paying client onboarded to P2 platform
TRIGGER-07.action: Execute onboarding checklist. Run S1-S7 compliance audit. Tier 0/1 only for client data.

TRIGGER-08.name: Daily API Cost Threshold
TRIGGER-08.action: T1: alert Ken. T2: escalate. T3: pause and alert.

TRIGGER-09.name: Warden Model Drift
TRIGGER-09.action: Yoda remediates within 1 heartbeat. Log CHG. Alert Ken.

TRIGGER-10.name: RETIRED — Business Stream Migration OC1→OC2
TRIGGER-10.note: Original plan: migrate Aria from OC1 to OC2. Superseded by Platform Separation — OC1 becomes standalone business node, OC2 is tech-only. No migration needed.

TRIGGER-11.name: glm-5.1 No-Think Mode Availability
TRIGGER-11.condition: Monthly check: Ollama releases no-think glm-5.1 variant
TRIGGER-11.action: Re-benchmark B2+B4. If latency ≤20s and quality ≥3.5 → add as Tier 2.

TRIGGER-12.name: Agent Allowlist Sync
TRIGGER-12.action: Run allowlist-sync.sh. Log CHG. Alert Ken with diff.

TRIGGER-13.name: Semantic Memory Store Go-Live
TRIGGER-13.condition: OC2 stable + MinIO in prod 2+ sprints
TRIGGER-13.action: Activate TKT-0153 semantic memory. Deprecate Option B tiered split.

TRIGGER-14.name: Phase 3: Event Sourcing Design
TRIGGER-14.condition: P2 stable: ≥2 SME clients live, uptime >99% for 30-day rolling window
TRIGGER-14.action: Atlas designs event sourcing migration from optimistic locking. Preserve TKT-0104 agent_state_history schema as seed.

TRIGGER-15.name: P1’P2 Checkpoint: Golden Blueprint Review
TRIGGER-15.condition: P2 launches — first SME client onboarded (target Aug 2026)
TRIGGER-15.action: Atlas: full refresh of both golden blueprints. Architecture Delta Summary for Ken. Requires APPROVED before P2 ops begin.

TRIGGER-16.name: P2’P4 Checkpoint: Golden Blueprint Review
TRIGGER-16.condition: TRIGGER-14 fires (post-P2 stable, event sourcing design begins)
TRIGGER-16.action: Atlas: full refresh of both golden blueprints. Add Phase 3 event sourcing architecture. FSI trajectory detail.

TRIGGER-17.name: Annual Review: Golden Blueprints (May each year)
TRIGGER-17.action: Atlas: full review against live platform state. Prune outdated. Revalidate OKRs/KRIs. Ken approval.

TRIGGER-18.name: Spark: LinkedIn Stability Arc Post
TRIGGER-18.action: Spark writes LinkedIn post on building production agentic AI platform — gateway stability, event loop saturation, diagnostic process.

TRIGGER-QBR.name: Quarterly QBR — Agent Fleet Review + Tribal Knowledge Audit
TRIGGER-QBR.action: 1. Agent Fleet Review (TKT-0130). 2. Tribal Knowledge Audit (TKT-0394) — scan all working memory + agent SOUL.md files for skill reference decay, new undocumented patterns, stale refs. Produce prioritized extraction backlog. Ken approves candidates. Executed per TKT-0393 CREST pattern (Forge on flash). 3. Orchestrator MD version bump. 4. Roadmap Refinement (TKT-0125).
